one_time_description: Nenagwas Community Development funding received from ISC ($13,095,859) recorded as deferred revenue for reserve development project
economic_notes: Nation is developing Nenagwas Community Development on York Road in Campbell River with total budgeted contract costs of $37,665,667. Investments in fisheries quota businesses (A-Tlegay Fisheries LP), timber (Nanwakolas Timber LP), carbon credits (Nanwakolas Carbon Credit LP and Nanwakolas Offset LP), and grizzly bear tourism (Knight Inlet Grizzly Tours via Timber LP). Logging income of $1,638,634 reported.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED because three controlled entities (Chief's Pride Aquaculture Corporation, Chief's Pride Seafoods Inc., and Happy as a Clam Shellfish Ltd.) financial data was not fully available and not fully consolidated. Financial statements are dated March 31, 2022 but were signed/audited April 26, 2024 — a two-year delay. Large deferred revenue of $13,095,859 received from ISC for Nenagwas Community Development project significantly inflated cash balance. Honoraria of $101,416 reported but no formal remuneration schedule provided. Segment disclosure shows ISC revenue of $2,366,016 vs $2,366,072 on income statement (minor rounding difference). Province code is BC (Campbell River, BC).
